name: Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Teaspoons vanilla extract or 1 Tbsp lemon zest and 1 Tbsp lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Lightly grease and flour a 9-inch by 5-inch loaf pan. Set aside.
3. Sift together the flour and salt. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl of an electric mixer, beat the butter until very light and creamy.
5. Add the sugar gradually and continue beating for 5 minutes until the mixture is very fluffy.
6. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Add the vanilla or lemon zest and juice. Mix in thoroughly.
8. Fold in the dry ingredients, mixing just until the batter is smooth and blended.
9. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan.
10. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Cool on a rack for about 10 minutes.
12. Remove the cake from the pan. Cool thoroughly and sprinkle with sifted confectioners sugar.
